parameters.query: SELECT id FROM leads WHERE id = :leadId AND status != 'enriched';
SELECT status FROM service_health WHERE service_name = 'enrichment_api';

UPDATE leads SET company_size = :companySize, industry = :industry, linkedin_url = :linkedin, twitter_handle = :twitter, website = :website, revenue_range = :revenueRange, location = :location, employee_count = :employeeCount, technologies = :technologies, enrichment_score = :score, lead_score = :leadScore, status = 'enriched', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = :leadId RETURNING *;
parameters.queryParameters: companySize={{$json.company_size}}, industry={{$json.industry}}, linkedin={{$json.linkedin}}, twitter={{$json.twitter}}, website={{$json.website}}, revenueRange={{$json.revenue_range}}, location={{$json.location}}, employeeCount={{$json.employee_count}}, technologies={{JSON.stringify($json.technologies)}}, score={{$json.enrichment_score}}, leadScore={{$json.lead_score}}, leadId={{$json.lead_id}}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO audit_log (workflow_name, actor, action, lead_id, details) VALUES ('Lead Enrichment', 'enrichment_service', 'ENRICH_SUCCESS', :leadId, :details);
